tools.name: get_prayer_times
tools.description: Get the five daily prayer times plus sunrise for a city or coordinates, computed with the same engine as the Wasilah app. On Fridays, Dhuhr is marked as Jumu’ah.

tools.name: get_next_prayer
tools.description: Get the next upcoming prayer and how long until it begins, for a city or coordinates.

tools.name: get_qibla
tools.description: Get the Qibla direction (compass bearing to the Kaaba) for a city or coordinates.

tools.name: get_hijri_date
tools.description: Get the Islamic (Hijri) date for a given Gregorian date, or today.

tools.name: get_quran_audio
tools.description: Get a streaming audio URL for full-surah Quran recitation, plus the surah name and ayah count.
